jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction (State)
enumTitles: WA — Washington (LIVE: official WA L&I open data, bond + insurance included)
CA — California (BETA: CSLB may rate-limit automated requests; returns clean error if unavailable, no charge on failure)
jurisdiction.description: Two-letter US state code. WA is fully live and reliable. CA is beta — returns a clean SESSION_ERROR if CSLB is unavailable; you are never charged on source failures.

license_number.title: License / Registration Number
license_number.description: Contractor license or registration number. WA: alphanumeric (e.g. ECOSTSC758NN). CA: numeric only, up to 8 digits (e.g. 1100000). Exact match, case-insensitive. Preferred over business_name for precision.

business_name.title: Business Name (WA only)
business_name.description: Business name or partial name for WA lookups. Case-insensitive partial match — may return multiple results. CA requires license_number instead.
